# How my site "accidentally" exploded with Google traffic 🫨

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-12 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 687

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

A few weeks ago, I was shocked when I checked my Google Analytics
account.

One of our newly published blog posts exploded with traffic from
Google, seemingly out of nowhere!

After analysis, I discovered that the traffic source is Google
Discover 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.eZ9NK64vn-Ed3DNZY4JaVrXVF5cvB4CKKDGHkG0Y33E )
: a content discovery engine that can send massive waves of
Google traffic to your website.

The best part… Google Discover puts your content in front of
people BEFORE they even search for it!

I've seen it bringing sudden surges of highly engaged visitors to
my sites.

Unfortunately, many beginners do not know how to tap into this
powerful traffic source.

👉 How to drive tons of traffic from Google Discover 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.eZ9NK64vn-Ed3DNZY4JaVrXVF5cvB4CKKDGHkG0Y33E )
: (8 tips you need to know)

Hot News: Earlier this week, Google confirmed Discover is coming
to desktop search as well! I highly recommend reading the above
article to learn how to optimize your content before the
rollout.

10 WordPress Plugins That Help You Drive Traffic
------------------------------------------------

Are you really using the right plugins to drive website traffic?

There are several WordPress plugins built specifically to help
you grow traffic, engagement, and subscribers.

Here are 10 WordPress plugins to drive traffic 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tmZPey24hMWalgWAe9_jc2-yAaTO-gtvdWY5dTfUAvw )
 that I recommend.

Some of them are absolutely free to use. Go check out if you’re
already using it or not.
